meaning: adj.再发生的,周期性发生的,循环的
examples: Race is a recurrent theme in the work.
A dentist may decide to extract the tooth to prevent recurrent trouble.
The late Cretaceous extinction of the dinosaurs and ammonoids was just one of the more drastic in a whole series of such recurrent extinction episodes.
Giving to and helping others has always been a recurrent theme in the Holiday Season.
Treatment for recurrent breast cancer that's spread beyond the breast region involves many different options.
